# guardicore_worksite (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a worksite from Akamai Guardicore Segmentation. You can look up a worksite by its ID or by name.

~> **Note:** The worksites feature must be enabled on the Akamai Guardicore Segmentation instance.

Assets and policy rules can be assigned to a worksite using the `worksite_id` attribute on `guardicore_asset` and `guardicore_policy_rule` resources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a worksite by ID.
data "guardicore_worksite" "by_id" {
  id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000030"
}

# Look up a worksite by name.
data "guardicore_worksite" "headquarters" {
  name = "Headquarters"
}

output "worksite_details" {
  value = {
    id      = data.guardicore_worksite.headquarters.id
    name    = data.guardicore_worksite.headquarters.name
    comment = data.guardicore_worksite.headquarters.comment
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the worksite. Either id or name must be specified.
- `name` (String) The name of the worksite. Used to look up a worksite by name.

### Read-Only

- `comment` (String) A comment for the worksite.
